findings.suggestedFix: Sylvanas was following the logic, weighing roads, villages, and crossings in the same sweep.

findings.text: It was not just passing through. It was taking hold.
The smell coming off the carcasses was not ordinary blood. It carried that same sweet-rot the wind had been dragging down the road.
findings.suggestedFix: It carried that same sweet-rot the wind had been dragging down the road.

findings.text: They didn't die first and rise after. It got into them while they were alive and kept driving them when their bodies should have failed.
findings.suggestedFix: It got into them while they were alive and kept driving them when their bodies should have failed.

findings.text: Her eyes swept the room once.
Jaina's hands wanted to map the pattern in the air.
findings.suggestedFix: Jaina wanted to map the pattern in the air.

findings.text: Cyndia's eyes went to the tree line.
findings.suggestedFix: Cyndia looked to the tree line.

findings.text: Millhaven is where it bunches hard enough to show its hand.
findings.suggestedFix: Millhaven is where it bunches hard enough to become visible.

findings.text: Millhaven gathered out of the dusk by a river bend: low buildings, a still mill wheel, cold chimneys, no light anywhere.
findings.suggestedFix: Millhaven appeared out of the dusk by a river bend with low buildings, a still mill wheel, cold chimneys, and no light anywhere.

findings.text: She had made the same warning three times: once for a border lieutenant, once for a senior scout, once for the dark-braided ranger who had taken her satchel with careful hands and enough sense to know what the instruments were.
findings.suggestedFix: She had made the same warning three times. Once for a border lieutenant, once for a senior scout, once for the dark-braided ranger who had taken her satchel with careful hands and enough sense to know what the instruments were.

findings.text: Farstrider armor worn the way a second skin is worn: no settling tug, no show of rank, no wasted motion.
findings.suggestedFix: Farstrider armor worn the way a second skin is worn, with no settling tug, no show of rank, and no wasted motion.

findings.text: She heard herself doing it again: careful, pared down, built for someone she assumed needed the simpler version.
findings.suggestedFix: She heard herself doing it again—careful, pared down, built for someone she assumed needed the simpler version.

findings.text: The read hit harder than the last one: deeper, uglier, faster.
findings.suggestedFix: The read hit harder than the last one, deeper and uglier and faster.

findings.text: Jaina could see it from the road now: soft heads of grain bending too low, leaves gone dark at the edges, damp ground under rows that should have been dry.
findings.suggestedFix: Jaina could see it from the road now, soft heads of grain bending too low, leaves gone dark at the edges, damp ground under rows that should have been dry.

findings.text: Then the village showed through the last of the trees: cold hearths, no smoke, stillness where evening life should have been.
findings.suggestedFix: Then the village showed through the last of the trees, cold hearths, no smoke, stillness where evening life should have been.

findings.text: Millhaven gathered out of the dusk by a river bend: low buildings, a still mill wheel, cold chimneys, no light anywhere.
findings.suggestedFix: Millhaven appeared out of the dusk by a river bend with low buildings, a still mill wheel, cold chimneys, and no light anywhere.
